metadata.name: Blood Tokens — Voldaren Epicure ETB creates Blood token, then activate to draw
metadata.description: Tests Blood token creation and activation using Voldaren Epicure. Step 1: P1 casts Voldaren Epicure ({R}, 1/1 Vampire). When it resolves and enters the battlefield, the ETB trigger fires and resolves inline, creating a Blood token on P1's battlefield (CR 111.10g: predefined Artifact — Blood token with activated ability '{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.'). The engine processes the ETB trigger inline during resolution — the Clue and Food token scripts establish this harness behavior. Step 2: P1 activates the Blood token's ability (ability_index 0) paying {1} generic, tapping the token, discarding Lightning Bolt from hand, and sacrificing the token as costs (CR 602.2c: sacrifice-as-cost moves token to graveyard at activation time). The ability goes on the stack and resolves, drawing P1 a card from library. Final state: Voldaren Epicure on battlefield, Blood token gone (sacrificed as SBA CR 704.5d), Lightning Bolt in graveyard (discarded), P1 hand size increased by one from the drawn card.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 111.10g: Blood is a predefined artifact token type. Blood tokens have the activated ability '{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.' The engine defines this via blood_token_spec() in card_definition.rs (blood_token_spec has requires_tap:true, mana_cost:{generic:1}, sacrifice_self:true, discard_card:true). The token is named 'Blood' (characteristics.name). CR 603.3: Voldaren Epicure's ETB trigger creates the Blood token via Effect::CreateToken. The engine processes ETB triggers inline during spell resolution (established by scripts 098 Thraben Inspector and 073/097 Food/Clue patterns — generation_notes for 098 explicitly state this). Therefore no separate ETB trigger step is needed — after stack_resolve for Voldaren Epicure, both Epicure and Blood token are on the battlefield with stack empty. CR 602.2c: The sacrifice cost in Blood token activation causes the token to leave the battlefield immediately when the ability is activated (before the ability is placed on the stack). The discard_card JSON field is used in player_action for activate_ability to specify which card from hand is discarded as a cost. JSON field name is 'discard_card' (matching script_schema.rs PlayerAction enum variant field). P1 starts with {red:1, colorless:1} in mana pool: red covers Voldaren Epicure cast ({R}), colorless:1 covers Blood token activation ({1}). Library has Harmonize for the draw. ability_index: 0 is the first (and only) non-mana activated ability on the Blood token. First attempt failed: stack.count=1 assertion after ETB was wrong (ETB resolves inline). Fixed: removed separate ETB stack step, bundled into single stack_resolve.

script.step_note: P1 casts Voldaren Epicure from hand paying {R}. Spell resolves, Epicure enters the battlefield, ETB trigger fires and resolves inline creating a Blood token.

actions.description: Initial state: P1 has Voldaren Epicure and Lightning Bolt in hand; battlefield empty; stack empty; library has Harmonize
actions.note: P1 has {R} + {1} colorless in mana pool. Voldaren Epicure costs {R}. Lightning Bolt will be discarded as cost for Blood token activation later. Library has Harmonize for the draw.
CR 601.2: P1 casts Voldaren Epicure from hand paying {R}. Spell moves to the stack. P1 retains Lightning Bolt in hand. Colorless:1 remains in mana pool.

actions.description: After casting Voldaren Epicure: spell on stack (count=1); Voldaren Epicure no longer in hand; Lightning Bolt still in hand
actions.note: Voldaren Epicure is on the stack. Lightning Bolt remains in P1's hand (count=1).
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Voldaren Epicure resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Voldaren Epicure resolves and enters the battlefield as a 1/1 Vampire creature under P1's control.

CR 603.3: ETB trigger fires — 'When Voldaren Epicure enters the battlefield, create a Blood token.' Trigger resolves inline. CR 111.10g: Blood token is a colorless Artifact — Blood with '{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.' Token created on P1's battlefield.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Voldaren Epicure resolves and enters battlefield. CR 603.3: ETB trigger fires and resolves inline, creating one Blood token. The harness processes ETB triggers inline during resolution (consistent with Clue/Food token scripts).

actions.description: After Voldaren Epicure resolves: Epicure and Blood token on P1's battlefield; stack empty; P1 hand has Lightning Bolt only
actions.note: Voldaren Epicure (1/1 Vampire) and Blood token (colorless Artifact — Blood) are both on P1's battlefield. Stack is empty. Lightning Bolt remains in P1's hand.

script.step_note: P1 activates the Blood token's ability. Costs: {1} generic, tap the token, discard Lightning Bolt from hand, sacrifice the token. CR 602.2c: sacrifice is paid as a cost — token leaves battlefield immediately at activation time. The ability resolves and P1 draws a card.

actions.note: CR 602.2: P1 activates the Blood token's activated ability (ability_index 0 — the only non-mana activated ability). Costs paid: {1} generic mana, tap the token, discard Lightning Bolt from hand, sacrifice the token. CR 602.2c: Sacrifice is a cost — the Blood token moves to the graveyard immediately before the ability is placed on the stack.

actions.description: After activating Blood token: token sacrificed and gone from battlefield, Lightning Bolt in graveyard (discarded), ability on stack (count=1), P1 hand empty
actions.note: CR 602.2c: Blood token is gone from battlefield (sacrificed as cost). Lightning Bolt is in graveyard (discarded as cost). Ability is on the stack waiting to resolve. P1's hand is empty.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Blood token ability resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: The Blood token ability resolves. P1 draws one card (Harmonize) from the top of their library into hand.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Blood token ability resolves — P1 draws a card.
CR 704.5d: Tokens in zones other than the battlefield cease to exist as a state-based action. The Blood token in the graveyard (sacrificed as a cost) is removed.

actions.description: Final state: Voldaren Epicure on P1's battlefield; Blood token gone; Lightning Bolt in graveyard; P1 drew one card (hand count=1); both players at 40 life
actions.note: CR 111.10g + 701.17a: Blood token was sacrificed as a cost and no longer exists (CR 704.5d removes tokens from non-battlefield zones). Lightning Bolt was discarded as a cost and is in P1's graveyard. P1 drew Harmonize and now holds it in hand (count=1). Voldaren Epicure remains on P1's battlefield as a 1/1 Vampire.
